name: rung_350_ce_story_multi_round_revision
utterances: Booklet mode with noisy edits and deterministic outcomes.
Set parent(iona, keir). Set parent(keir, lyra). Set parent(lyra, nico).
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).
Set at(nico, west_archive). Set inside(west_archive, sunmere).
Pronoun note for next mutation: she means Lyra and him means Nico.

utterances.utterance: and he passed it down to her kid not his
clarification_answers: He means Keir, it means red_key, her means Lyra, and her kid means Nico.
This is a transfer note; explicit key transfer mutations follow.

utterances.utterance: drop that middle parent tie but keep i->k and still make nico reachable
clarification_answers: Middle parent tie means parent(keir, lyra). Keep parent(iona, keir).
Do not remove parent(iona, keir); only the explicit middle-link retraction and follow-up add apply.

utterances: Final continuity query: query ancestor(iona, nico). Query in_region(nico, sunmere). Query carries(nico, red_key).
